sections.instruction: Questions 1-4: Complete the list of reasons why these people suffer from stress. Choose from the list of possible causes below. What did each person say was the principal cause of stress for them? Questions 5-7: List THREE parts of one’s daily routine that can help reduce stress. Write NO MORE THAN THREE WORDS for each answer. Questions 8-10: Complete the table below. Write NO MORE THAN THREE WORDS for each answer.
sections.passage_or_context:
Reasons why these people suffer from stress:
Ramon — Team work
Kikuko — {{BLANK}}
Boris — {{BLANK}}
Etienne — {{BLANK}}
Nagwa — {{BLANK}}

Possible causes of stress:
A bad management
B dual-career family
C fear of unemployment
D new technologies
E physical surroundings
F powerlessness
G too much work

Strategies for reducing stress from specific causes

questions.content:
(1) Kikuko — principal cause of stress
(2) Boris — principal cause of stress
(3) Etienne — principal cause of stress
(4) Nagwa — principal cause of stress

sections.instruction: Questions 31 and 32: Complete the sentences below. Write NO MORE THAN THREE WORDS for each answer. Questions 33-37: Complete the notes below. questions.content: What is the advice of preventing sports injuries? Circle THREE letters from A-F.
options: D do enough preparatory exercises before training
